title: Part 5 – Entraînement 2 : prépositions & conjonctions
instructions: Choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui complète correctement chaque phrase.

items.sentence: The conference will be held ____ the Grand Hotel on the fourteenth of March.
items.explanation: "at" + lieu précis (hôtel, adresse, lieu d'événement) : "at the Grand Hotel".

items.sentence: We've been working on this project ____ almost six months now.
The package was delivered ____ noon, just as requested.
items.explanation: "by noon" = avant midi au plus tard (limite temporelle).

items.sentence: The CEO resigned ____ pressure from the board of directors.
Please complete the form and return it ____ the attached envelope.
items.explanation: "in the attached envelope" : préposition correcte pour "dans l'enveloppe ci-jointe".

items.sentence: The meeting was productive, ____ it ran thirty minutes longer than planned.
items.explanation: Contraste entre un résultat positif et un inconvénient : "although".

items.sentence: Sales have declined ____ the new competitor entered the market.
items.explanation: "since" + point de départ d'une situation avec present perfect : "since the competitor entered".

items.sentence: She was promoted ____ her outstanding results over the past year.
items.explanation: "due to" + groupe nominal exprime la cause.

items.sentence: The office will remain open ____ the bank holiday, as previously announced.
items.explanation: "during" + nom d'une période : "during the bank holiday".

items.sentence: We will proceed ____ your approval has been received.
items.explanation: "once" introduit une condition préalable : "proceed once approval has been received".
